ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state/union territory */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state/union territory */,
  "area_sq_km" INTEGER /* Area in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated mid-year population (in thousands) */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state/union territory */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state/union territory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_statistics" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime statistics entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state/union territory */,
  "total_crimes_ipc" INTEGER /* Total cognizable crimes under IPC */,
  "policemen_per_100_sq_km" REAL /* Number of policemen per 100 square kilometers of area */,
  "policemen_per_10000_population" REAL /* Number of policemen per 10,000 of population */,
  "ipc_cases_per_civil_policeman" REAL /* Number of IPC cases per civil policeman */,
  "civil_police_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of civil police of total police strength */,
  "crime_rate_per_lakh_population" REAL /* Crime rate per 100,000 population */,
  "ipc_crime_types" TEXT /* Types of cognizable crimes under IPC */,
  "citizen_police_ratio" REAL /* Citizen-police ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "police_strength" (
  "strength_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each police strength entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state/union territory */,
  "civil_strength" INTEGER /* Actual police strength - Civil */,
  "armed_strength" INTEGER /* Actual police strength - Armed */,
  "total_strength" INTEGER /* Actual police strength - Total */,
  "police_to_population_ratio" REAL /* Police-to-population ratio */,
  "sanctioned_strength" INTEGER /* Sanctioned police strength */,
  "vacancy_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of vacancies in the police force */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strength_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_police_strength_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used to generate the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state/union territory */,
  "prediction_type" TEXT /* Type of prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the prediction */,
  "prediction_model" TEXT /* Machine learning model used for prediction */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_changes" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy change */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state/union territory */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of policy */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy was implemented or simulated */,
  "predicted_impact" TEXT /* Predicted impact of the policy change */,
  "policy_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the policy */,
  "implementation_status" TEXT /* Status of policy implementation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_changes_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)
